raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 4,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 2,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent flags at least one claim the evidence does not support (e.g., leap from CTR delta to interruption cost).",
    "R1.7": "The agent audits every load-bearing citation; flags missing key works with bibliographic precision.",
    "RX.1": "The authors do not disclose uncertainty for clearly out-of-reach claims, but they acknowledge limitations in §X.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), with some minor scope drifts.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free but with one minor regression (e.g., overreaching generalization claims).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, although some details are unclear or missing."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.85,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent flags at least one claim the evidence does not support (e.g., leap from CTR delta to interruption cost).
rationale.R1.7: The agent audits every load-bearing citation; flags missing key works with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: The authors do not disclose uncertainty for clearly out-of-reach claims, but they acknowledge limitations in §X.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), with some minor scope drifts.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with one minor regression (e.g., overreaching generalization claims).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, although some details are unclear or missing.
